title: Diamond Smp +
description: Keeps The Regular Stuff and Adds Qol
body:
# Diasmp PvP texurepack Made by Kars / Nyyv
**Not Completed**
**What it includes**

- >  Bow pullout colour from: green / orange / red 
- >  Crossbow pullout colour from: green / orange / red 
- >  Unique Sword Design
- >  Cyan Webs

**Some QOls**

1. No explosions Particles
1. Low Fire
1. Small Shield / Side shield
1. Removed pumpkin blur 
 

**Add k.arz on discord if you find a glitch / suggestions**

This texture pack is All Rights Reserved.
You may download and use it for personal gameplay.
